title: O1-O5 oscillatory / dynamical-systems cross-pollination — live benchmark against real data
runBy: Claude Code (Opus 4.8), Mac Studio; standing benchmarking authorization
honestyContract: A run is not a result; negative results are results. Every gate row stays Open unless its pre-registered acceptance gate is met. All figures reproduced and adversarially verified (independent re-derivation, refutation attempts).

generation.subject: deepseek-chat (api.deepseek.com)
generation.mockGuard: assert cfg.kind!='mock'; DEEPSEEK_API_KEY present; grader resolve_config('grok').provider=='grok'

embedder.wiring: oscillator_core.hash_embed delegates under OSC_EMBED_BACKEND=minilm; active_embed_backend() surfaces it; invariants preserved (unit-norm text / zero-vector empty)

backends.hiddenStates: Qwen/Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct via mlx_lm.load + build_hidden_state_featurizer (real MLX residual stream, 2048-d)

headline: On the real datasets tested, NONE of the five oscillatory-coherence gates are met. The Kuramoto convergence/coherence readout does not add a verification/abstention signal beyond sophia's existing gates: consensus-r ties (does not beat) self-consistency and shows no correctness-separation direction (O1/O4); the hidden-state energy head does not transfer out-of-domain (O2); the fixed-point residual only separates via a label-token artifact (O3); O5 stays a simulation. All rows remain Open.

O1_consensus_gate.gate: verdict==consensus_beats_baseline with paired-AURC 95% CI lower bound >0, reproduced across >=2 seeds
O1_consensus_gate.dataset: google/simpleqa-verified re-generated: 150 questions x 6 deepseek samples, grok-graded; attempted slice n=129 (26 correct). Decontam: SimpleQA is eval-only, never trained in this repo.
O1_consensus_gate.adversarialCheck: HOLDS (severity none). Reproduced to 6 decimals; semantic embedder genuinely active. Kuramoto r shows NO separation direction: mean r|correct=0.976 < r|wrong=0.985 (higher for WRONG); baseline majority-agreement separates correctly (0.590 vs 0.461). Hyperparameter sweep (gain, steps) finds no winning config.
O1_consensus_gate.reproduce: OSC_EMBED_BACKEND=minilm HF_HUB_OFFLINE=1 PYTHONPATH=. python3 tools/consensus_gate_oscillator.py --records o1_attempted.jsonl --seed {0,1,7} --n-boot 5000

O2_energy_verifier.gate: implement build_hidden_state_featurizer; train energy head on verifier-labelled (answer,evidence); calibrated energy (AUROC/ECE, paired-bootstrap CI excluding 0) AND held-out-domain goodhartGap<=0.15
O2_energy_verifier.verdict: NOT_MET (featurizer implemented; energy not calibrated to correctness out-of-domain)
O2_energy_verifier.dataset: agi-proof/external-eval/factcheck-full-r1.json: 69 verifier-labelled (claim,evidence,verdict,correct) across 4 domains. Brief's named source (verified_traces.jsonl) absent -> factcheck substitute (recorded).
O2_energy_verifier.adversarialCheck: HOLDS (severity none). Real Qwen2.5-3B hidden states confirmed (not stub). Decisive cross-check: supervising on ground-truth 'correct' directly still yields LODO OOF AUROC=0.500. Two harness artifacts (full-set z-score, energy saturation) both favor the hidden head, so neither masks a pass. Label confound: all 12 accepted are correct (accepted subset of correct); n=69 underpowered.

deepening.question: Does a proper regularized probe + more data/domains + both labels recover the hidden-state signal?
deepening.protocol: L2 logistic (sklearn, class_weight=balanced) over the SAME real Qwen MLX hidden states; combined factcheck-full-r1 + fact-check-live (n=122, deduped, more domains); leave-one-domain-out OOF; supervised on both `accepted` and `correct`.
deepening.verdict: gate_not_met_robust — proper probe + more data/domains still does not clear chance out-of-fold
deepening.takeaway: Robust negative: even the fairest head+data+label still fails to clear chance out-of-fold (several arms BELOW 0.5 = anti-correlated across unseen domains). O2's hidden-state energy does not generalize on this task.

O2_energy_verifier.verifiedTraceSource: agent/memory/contract/verified_traces.jsonl is EMPTY (module supports an evidence field, but no traces emitted). O2's named source would require a full RLVR run to populate (--run-train lane; escalates to human).

O3_fixedpoint_stability.gate: residual/non-convergence gate rejects unsupported live claims with F1 beating the current admission arm at matched coverage on the real C1 fact pack
O3_fixedpoint_stability.verdict: NOT_MET (weak, partly artifactual separation; full gate blocked)
O3_fixedpoint_stability.dataset: eval/fact_check/heldout_v1.jsonl (C1) x fixtures_v1.json evidence: 20 claim+evidence rows (11 supported).
O3_fixedpoint_stability.adversarialCheck: HOLDS but would-change-numbers. Direction real (supported residual 0.767 < unsupported 0.884, AUROC~0.75) BUT largely a LABEL-TOKEN LEAK: evidence snippets contain [ENTAILS]/[CONTRADICTS] restating the claim; on marker-free rows the gap collapses to +0.016. Full gate genuinely blocked: agent/realtime_benchmark.py needs py3.11+ (fact_check_gate.py:149 regex) and the coverage-matched-F1 arm is unimplemented (no selective_risk import).
O3_fixedpoint_stability.reproduce: OSC_EMBED_BACKEND=minilm HF_HUB_OFFLINE=1 PYTHONPATH=. python3 tools/fixedpoint_stability_gate.py --records o3_claim_evidence.jsonl

O4_adaptive_compute.gate: wire stopping rule into agent/long_horizon.py bounded by deadline_monotonic; adaptive-k matches fixed-k selective accuracy (paired CI contains 0) while cutting mean samples >=25%
O4_adaptive_compute.verdict: NOT_MET (raw savings real but degenerate; no selective skill; live-integration seam absent)
O4_adaptive_compute.dataset: same regenerated SimpleQA pack as O1 (n=129).
O4_adaptive_compute.stepsMatchedCheck: both arms @steps=40: saved 60-66%, noQualityLoss=true all seeds (asymmetry non-decisive)
O4_adaptive_compute.adversarialCheck: HOLDS but would-change-numbers. 89% of rows stop at k=2 because Kuramoto r over 2 points locks to ~1.0 for ANY two short strings (even 'yes'/'no'->0.9997) — coherence-metric saturation, not adaptive compute. 'noQualityLoss' is VACUOUS: both AURCs sit at the 0.798 no-skill floor (ties O1's null). Full gate blocked: long_horizon.py has no self-consistency sampler / no deadline_monotonic; run_long_horizon_timed.py:164 passes a kwarg that raises TypeError.
O4_adaptive_compute.reproduce: OSC_EMBED_BACKEND=minilm HF_HUB_OFFLINE=1 PYTHONPATH=. python3 tools/adaptive_compute_convergence.py --records o1_attempted.jsonl --k-max 6 --seed {0,1,7}

O5_oscillator_substrate.gate: contingent on O2; any hardware/energy claim needs a real OIM mapping + measured energy — out of scope for a software repo
O5_oscillator_substrate.adversarialCheck: simulationOnly:true, hardwareClaim:false hardcoded at all emission sites; no watt/joule/hardware claim; energies are INPUTS never measured.

ledgerImpact: All five failure-ledger rows stay Open. None met its acceptance gate. O2's build_hidden_state_featurizer seam is now genuinely implemented (unlocks W1/W5), but the O2 gate itself is not met.

unlocked_followons.featurizer: build_hidden_state_featurizer is now genuinely implemented (Qwen2.5-3B MLX). The handover names it as the shared seam that also unlocks W1 (process-reward model) and W5 (probe-as-loss) — these remain runnable follow-ons, not executed here.
unlocked_followons.o2_real_dataset: Populate verified_traces.jsonl via an RLVR run to obtain the gate's named (answer,evidence,accept/reject) source; or assemble a larger balanced verifier-labelled multi-domain pack (current n underpowered, accepted subset of correct).
